description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:alpine Docker image with a global before_script that runs "apk update && apk add git" and "pip3 install '.[dev]'". Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a docs job that executes "sphinx-build docs/sphinx public" and saves the public/ directory as an artifact, a lint job that runs "pylint src", a test job that runs "pytest", and a typecheck job that runs "mypy src". In the deploy stage add a pages job that reuses the same "sphinx-build docs/sphinx public" command, publishes the public artifact to GitLab Pages, and only runs when $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH is "main".
